name: John Beresford Tipton Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the candy bars in a double boiler.
2. Remove from heat and add cereal, mixing until coated.
3. Add marshmallows and mix well.
4. Pour into a buttered pan that is about 7 by 10 inches.
5. Let cool until set.
6. Cut into 20 to 30 small squares.
